title: scrophularia schiraziana
intro: Scrophularia schiraziana, also known as Persian licorice or Irano-Turkmen licorice, is a perennial plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Scrophularia schiraziana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal medicine, Scrophularia schiraziana is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, and is used to treat a variety of conditions, including skin infections, wounds, and menstrual disorders.
